mappings.reason: Require MFA for Externally-Exposed Applications enforces MFA for a subset of trusted data environment access vectors (external exposure), but does not cover all trusted data environments or remote VPN sessions.
Require MFA for Remote Network Access directly enforces MFA for remote VPN sessions (a subset of remote network access), but does not explicitly cover access to trusted data environments.

Require MFA for Administrative Access enforces MFA for a subset of trusted data environment access vectors (privileged access), but does not cover non-administrative trusted data access or remote VPN sessions.
